game_info.title: Tilt Roller
game_info.concept:
Swipe to roll. Stay on the path. Can you make it to the goal?

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tenkyu/id1189800250

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Swipe to roll. Stay on the path. Can you make it to the goal?

Swipe your finger to roll the ball through tricky 3D levels.
Guide the ball from platform to platform without falling off!
It’s all about timing, precision, and control.

Features:
 - Simple swipe controls
 - Satisfying physics-based gameplay
 - Hundreds of fun and challenging levels
 - Clean, minimalistic 3D visuals
 - Easy to pick up, hard to master

Stay focused and don’t let the ball fall. One swipe can make all the difference!
game_info.description: Tilt the world to guide the ball through 3D mazes. Reach the goal zone to advance to the next level. Be careful not to fall off the edges!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys / WASD: Tilt the stage (Up/W tilts forward, Down/S tilts back, Left/A tilts left, Right/D tilts right)
- Space: Brake / Stop rolling
- R: Restart level
- ESC: Pause game
- Enter: Start game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify stage tilting mechanics affect physics gravity vector.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Initiate game in TEST_1 mode. Automatically apply a forward tilt input for 60 frames. Monitor the internal gravity vector in local space.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The local gravity vector z-component should become negative (pulling ball forward), and the ball's z-position should decrease (move forward) from origin.
TEST_1.description: Verify stage tilting mechanics affect physics gravity vector.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify win condition triggers correct state transition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Start game in TEST_2 mode. Teleport the player ball directly into the goal zone coordinates. Wait 1 frame for collision detection.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The gameState.gamePhase should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN" immediately upon the next update loop.
TEST_2.description: Verify win condition triggers correct state transition.
TEST_2.strategy: Start game in TEST_2 mode. Teleport the player ball directly into the goal zone coordinates. Wait 1 frame for collision detection.
TEST_2.expected: The gameState.gamePhase should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN" immediately upon the next update loop.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify falling off the map triggers loss condition.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Teleport player ball to a position with no floor (y = -50). Wait for physics update.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify wall collisions prevent passing through objects.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Place ball close to a wall. Apply strong tilt force towards the wall. Monitor position over 30 frames.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The ball's position should not cross the wall's boundary coordinate, indicating successful collision resolution.
TEST_4.description: Verify wall collisions prevent passing through objects.

TEST_5.test_description: Verify restart functionality resets game state.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Play until a game over state. Press 'R' (simulate input). Check player position and score.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game phase returns to START (or PLAYING), player position resets to spawn, and score/level persists or resets correctly depending on design.
TEST_5.description: Verify restart functionality resets game state.
TEST_5.strategy: Play until a game over state. Press 'R' (simulate input). Check player position and score.
TEST_5.expected: Game phase returns to START (or PLAYING), player position resets to spawn, and score/level persists or resets correctly depending on design.
